Issues: The image is a simple illustration. While suitable for certain digital markets, commercial viability for high-end print quality depends heavily on the resolution and line work fidelity.
The commercial appeal is limited by the simplicity of the design; it fits niche markets (e.g., stickers, character design) but may lack broad appeal for general illustration commissions.
To increase commercial appeal, adding more defined texture, complex shading, or a clearer artistic style (e.g., specific manga, anime, or vintage aesthetic) could enhance uniqueness.
